evidence_quotes.quote: Sideloading or installing whatever software i want should be allowed on the device i purchased.
requiring idwntification of the app or program developer.

paragraphs.text: I feel like a digital fairness act should include the freedom or fairness to install whatever software i want on my smartphone/computer/other digital device without a major monopolistic company like apple/google/microsoft having a say in wether or not they deem the software safe to install by requiring idwntification of the app or program developer. The fact that a company can decide to ban a developer of a possibly competing product from having apps that can be installed on a consumers device is frankly disgusting and in breach of fair market practices. Sideloading or installing whatever software i want should be allowed on the device i purchased.
